Petition To Compel Trustee To File An Account And For Distribution Of Trust Assests
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Continued To Apr-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To File An Account And For Distribution Of Trust Assests
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Continued To Feb-25-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Angel Riley for Asia Galicia (Petitioner).
Neil Chan for Trustee.

Mr. Chan stated that they reached a settlement agreement and that they are jointly requesting a continuance to February 25th. Ms. Riley stated that assuming everything goes to plan, she is happy to submit a stipulation or possibly a dismissal, and that she is not sure if she will submit a petition for approval of the settlement. The Petition to Compel Trustee to File an Account, etc. is continued to February 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
